justification: The diff correctly migrates from Java 8/Spring 4/Hibernate 5 to Java 21/Spring 6/Hibernate 6, updating dependencies (hibernate-core, jakarta.persistence-api, mysql-connector-j), switching javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence, and modernizing Spring MVC annotations (@GetMapping/@PostMapping). The compiler plugin is updated to use <release>21. No spurious churn is present. However, it doesn't leverage any Java 21-specific language features (like records, pattern matching, or virtual threads), so idiomatic_java21 is 4 instead of 5.
